title: EquiCap
description: Equally distribute mobs throughout your player-base.
body:
# EquiCap - Mob-spawning justice for all players
Equicap forces all players to have equal mob caps. It allows for fine-tuning the total mob caps for each mob category. This is similar to PaperMC's (and other projects) per-player-mob-spawning, however this offers finer control over the mob cap sizes *without restarting*.

Most features besides mode switching can be accessed with `/equicap`. Type `/equicap help` to get a list of commands. Modes can be edited in the config file.

### Modes:
- **VanillaLike**: Partially merges mob cap values when players are near each other.
- **Combine**: Completely merges mob cap values when players are near each other.
- **None**: Never merges mob cap values (every player always has an equal mob cap)
